targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,4) AS value FROM ai_scores WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT COALESCE(label,'unlabelled') AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ai_scores WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Daily accuracy — drift detection
panels.description: Watch for downward trends — they indicate model quality degradation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) AS time, ROUND(AVG(score)::numeric,4) AS avg_score, ROUND(MIN(score)::numeric,4) AS min_score, COUNT(*) AS samples FROM ai_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT s.created_at AS time, s.score, s.label, e.model, e.provider, e.endpoint, e.env, e.latency_ms, s.trace_id FROM ai_scores s LEFT JOIN ai_events e ON e.trace_id = s.trace_id WHERE s.score < 0.6 AND s.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY s.score ASC LIMIT 100
